scale.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter uppercase
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl lg:text-5xl font-bold tracking-tight uppercase

layout_and_spacing.surface_strategy: Crystal Glass for Header/Navbar and Modals. Neumorphic tactile sharp edges for Admin Dashboard cards. Flat dark backgrounds with subtle 1px borders for E-commerce product cards.

components.button_primary: bg-blue-600 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-blue-500 hover:shadow-[0_0_25px_rgba(37,99,235,0.5)] transition-all duration-300
components.button_secondary: bg-transparent border border-white/20 text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:border-white/60 transition-all duration-300
components.product_card: group relative bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 overflow-hidden hover:border-blue-500/40 transition-all duration-500
components.input_field: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-none px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 transition-all duration-300 placeholder:text-white/30

hero_image.description: Cinematic hero banner showing male model in premium black streetwear with electric blue neon edge lighting.

texture_bg.description: Abstract deep black background with glowing electric blue light leaks.

category_streetwear.description: Model in oversized black streetwear jacket with blue rim light.

category_college.description: Youth in premium dark varsity college jacket.

product_1.description: Man in puffer vest leaning on luxury SUV.

product_2.description: Group of fashionable men in black urban street fashion.

product_3.description: Man wearing sunglasses and bandana, urban style.

interactions_and_motion.hover_states: Images scale-105 smoothly. Interactive elements glow with blue box-shadow. Text color shifts to white on hover for muted text.
interactions_and_motion.modal_animation: Framer motion recommended. Use opacity 0 to 1, y: 20 to 0, duration 0.4s easeOut.
interactions_and_motion.focus_states: Accessibility ring must be blue-500 with high contrast.
interactions_and_motion.scroll_reveal: Elements should fade-in and slide-up slightly on scroll to maintain a premium feel.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark theme. The body background should be #050505.
Import 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or 'Clash Display' / 'Outfit' as fallback) for headings and 'Manrope' for body text from Google Fonts or similar CDN.
For the Hero Section, use the provided 'hero_image'. Overlay it with a gradient (bg-gradient-to-t from-[#050505] via-transparent to-transparent) to blend smoothly with the page.
Use the provided category and product images in the Product Grid.
Implement the 'Crystal Glass' strategy for the sticky Navbar and Product Modals (bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-xl border-white/10).
Add 'Electric Blue' glowing effects to primary buttons, active states, and hovered product cards.
Ensure all interactive elements have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
Avoid using generic rounded corners for primary buttons; use rounded-none for a sharper, editorial 'Nike-style' streetwear aesthetic, or rounded-sm at most.
Use Shadcn UI for the Admin Dashboard, but customize it to match the dark theme (remove default white backgrounds, use flat dark greys).
